data.title: Canaccord Genuity Group Inc. reports Q3 fiscal 2026 results: Revenue $616.1M, net income $56.8M, EPS $0.36, 36.5% YoY revenue growth.
data.description: Canaccord Genuity Group Inc. reported its financial results for the third fiscal quarter and nine-month period ending December 31, 2025. The company saw a strong performance in its global capital markets and wealth management operations. Third quarter revenue was $616.1 million, a 36.5% increase year-over-year, with net income before taxes of $80.5 million, up 102.5% compared to the previous year. Global wealth management operations earned record quarterly revenue of $304.3 million, with total client assets reaching $144.8 billion. The UK & Crown Dependencies saw revenue of $130.4 million in the third quarter. The company also addressed media speculation regarding its UK wealth management business, stating uncertainties about any potential transactions and valuations. Additionally, investments in acquisitions contributed to revenue growth. Canaccord Genuity Capital Markets reported revenue of $300.8 million, a 42.8% increase from the previous year, with improvements in investment banking revenue. The company announced dividends of $0.085 per share in the third quarter. Overall, the company showed positive financial growth and strategic investments in various markets.

data.title: Eversource Energy reports full-year 2025 earnings of $1.69 billion ($4.56 per share) compared to $811.7 million in 2024.
data.description: Eversource Energy, a company listed on NYSE as ES, released its full-year and fourth quarter 2025 financial results on February 12, 2026. The report includes a "CONSOLIDATED STATEMENTS OF INCOME/(LOSS)" table. In 2025, Eversource Energy reported earnings of $1.69 billion, or $4.56 per share, showing significant growth from the $811.7 million, or $2.27 per share, earned in 2024. Non-GAAP recurring earnings for the year totaled $1.77 billion, equivalent to $4.76 per share.

data.title: Granite Ridge Resources announces $0.11 quarterly dividend per share, payable on March 13, 2026, to shareholders as of February 27, 2026.
data.description: In Dallas, Granite Ridge Resources, Inc. (NYSE: GRNT) revealed a quarterly dividend of $0.11 per share, set to be distributed on March 13, 2026, to shareholders as of February 27, 2026. The declaration of future dividends is contingent on Board of Directors' approval. The company will disclose its financial outcomes from the fourth quarter of 2025 during an earnings conference call.

data.title: Proxy advisory firms recommend shareholders vote for Criteo S.A.'s redomiciliation to Luxembourg from France - Glass Lewis & Co., LLC and Institutional Shareholder Services, Inc. support the move.
data.description: In New York on February 13, 2026, Criteo S.A. (NASDAQ: CRTO) disclosed that two prominent independent proxy advisory firms, Glass Lewis & Co., LLC and Institutional Shareholder Services, Inc., have made announcements. Criteo is a global platform that facilitates connections within the commerce ecosystem.

data.title: Harley-Davidson, Inc. (NYSE: HOG) declares $0.1875 dividend per share for Q1 2026, payable on March 17.
data.description: Harley-Davidson, Inc. (NYSE: HOG) headquartered in Milwaukee has announced a cash dividend of $0.1875 per share for Q1 of 2026, approved by its Board of Directors. This dividend will be paid out on March 17, 2026, to shareholders holding the Company's common stock as of March.

data.title: Trinity Biotech (Nasdaq: TRIB) told to meet Nasdaq rule of $1 min bid price for 30 days to stay listed.
data.description: On February 13, 2026, Trinity Biotech plc (Nasdaq: TRIB), a biotechnology company specializing in human diagnostics and diabetes management, was informed by the Nasdaq Stock Market LLC that they are not meeting the minimum bid price requirement of $1.00 per share for their American Depositary Shares (ADSs) as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5450(a)(1). This notice, issued on February 11, 2026, states that the Company's ADSs have not closed at or above $1.00 for the past 30 consecutive business days. Trinity Biotech plc focuses on developing wearable biosensors and other solutions in the medical field.

data.title: South Bow Corp. shares RCA findings of Keystone Pipeline incident at MP-171 in North Dakota in April 2025.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on February 13, 2026, South Bow Corp. (TSX & NYSE: SOBO) in collaboration with the Pipeline and Hazardous Materials Safety Administration (PHMSA) revealed the findings of the independent third-party root cause analysis (RCA) regarding the occurrence at Milepost 171 (MP-171) of the Keystone Pipeline on April 8, 2025, close to Fort Ransom, North Dakota.

data.title: Fairfax Financial Holdings will host a conference call on Feb 20, 2026, to discuss 2025 results. Dial 1 (800) 369-2143.
data.description: Fairfax Financial Holdings Limited (TSX: FFH and FFH.U) has announced that they will be hosting a conference call on Friday, February 20, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss their 2025 year-end results. The results will be revealed after the market closes on Thursday, February 19, 2026, and will be posted on their website www.fairfax.ca. The call will include a presentation by the company, followed by a question period. To join the call, dial 1 (800) 369-2143 for Canada and the U.S. or 1 (312) 470-0063 for international participants, using the passcode "FAIRFAX."

data.title: NIKE, Inc. (NYSE: NKE) declares $0.41 quarterly dividend for Class A and B shareholders; payable April 1, 2026.
data.description: NIKE, Inc. has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.41 per share on its outstanding Class A and Class B Common Stock. The dividend is payable on April 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 2, 2026. NIKE, Inc. is a global leader in the design, marketing, and distribution of athletic footwear, apparel, equipment, and accessories. Headquartered near Beaverton, Oregon, the company continues to be at the forefront of the industry.

data.title: Black Rifle Coffee Company (NYSE: BRCC) receives NYSE notice for not meeting minimum stock price of $1.00 per share.
data.description: A veteran-founded premium beverage company, Black Rifle Coffee Company (NYSE: BRCC), disclosed receiving a notice from the New York Stock Exchange showing non-compliance with the minimum price criteria for continued listing. As per Section 802.01C of the NYSE Listed Company Manual, the average closing price of the Company’s Class A common stock fell below $1.00. This notification prompts the need to address the deficiency to maintain compliance with NYSE regulations.

data.title: Presidents' Day sale offers discounts on LG TVs, appliances, and smart home essentials in limited time offer.
data.description: LG Electronics USA is currently offering exclusive discounts on a wide range of products including their cutting-edge TVs, appliances, entertainment systems, and smart home devices. The limited-time promotion includes savings on select LG OLED and QNED TV models, as well as various kitchen and laundry appliances. This special offer provides customers with the opportunity to purchase these innovative products at a reduced cost. Take advantage of this deal to bring top-of-the-line technology into your home today.

data.title: Homeland Security has requested social media companies like Google and Meta to provide info on accounts criticizing ICE with hundreds of subpoenas.
data.description: Hundreds of subpoenas have been issued by the department to companies like Google and Meta for data related to accounts discussing or monitoring Immigration and Customs Enforcement. This move follows requests made to tech workers and officials for information on such accounts.

data.title: White House adviser believes banks should not worry about stablecoin yield, amidst debate on CLARITY crypto bill.
data.description: The CLARITY crypto market structure bill is facing significant debate due to the inclusion of cryptocurrency companies and platforms offering stablecoin rewards. These entities have emerged as a key issue in the discussion, with their presence sparking controversy within the market.

data.title: X3 Holdings (Nasdaq: XTKG) reports positive results from Annual General Meeting in Singapore on Feb.13, 2026.
data.description: Singapore, February 13, 2026 - X3 Holdings Co., Ltd. (Nasdaq: XTKG), a renowned global provider of digital solutions and technology services across various sectors, disclosed the successful passing of all shareholder resolutions during its annual general meeting. The Company, also known as XTKG, operates in a wide array of industries.

data.title: X3 Holdings (Nasdaq: XTKG) receives Nasdaq delisting notice on Feb 10, 2026 due to failure to meet requirements.
data.description: In Singapore on February 13, 2026, X3 Holdings Co., Ltd. (Nasdaq: XTKG) revealed that on February 10, 2026, they were issued a determination letter by The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC concerning a failure to meet certain requirements. The letter highlights areas where the company did not meet the Nasdaq's stipulations.

data.title: Badger Meter (NYSE:BMI) declares $0.40 per share dividend, increases repurchase by $75M, totaling $150M.
data.description: The Board of Directors at Badger Meter, Inc. (NYSE:BMI) has announced a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.40 per share for shareholders of record on February 27, 2026, with a payment date of March 13, 2026. Additionally, they have approved a $75 million increase to the Company’s share repurchase authorization. This addition supplements the initial $75 million approved in November 2025, resulting in a total share repurchase authorization of $150 million.

data.title: Ambow Education Holding Ltd. files Form 10-K for fiscal year 2025 with SEC. Global innovator of AI-powered phygital solutions.
data.description: In Cupertino, California, on February 13, 2026, Ambow Education Holding Ltd. disclosed the filing of its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year concluded on December 31, 2025, to the Securities and Exchange Commission. Ambow Education Holding Ltd., known as "Ambow," operates as a global leader in AI-powered phygital solutions catering to education, conferencing, and events. The company, listed on NYSE American as AMBO, continues to innovate in blending physical and digital realms.

data.title: Artist John R. Lowery releases "Humble Decade: The Art of Humble Donkey" book detailing his artistic journey.
data.description: Acclaimed Texas artist John R. Lowery has recently entered the realm of literature with his debut book, "Humble Decade: The Art of Humble Donkey," now available. This book marks a new venture for Lowery, showcasing his reflective collection that spans over a decade. The work explores the artistic journey of "Humble Donkey" through a series of written reflections. The book offers readers a unique perspective on the creative process and artistic evolution of Lowery, inviting them to delve into the world of this Texas talent.
